phaseGoal: Forge unlock (run project-scoped sem forgeSourceSessionId via createForgeRunFromProject) + delivery-status machinery: trigger auto in_progress->review on run done, colunas kanban Review/Production, production toggle manual de PM, e botao Enviar pra Forge ligado.

userStories.title: Migration — auto-transição deliveryStatus on run done
userStories.description: Cria trigger function update_prd_delivery_on_done() + trigger trg_forge_run_delivery_review (AFTER UPDATE OF status ON ForgeRun) que promove ProductRequirement.deliveryStatus in_progress->review pros PRDs cobertos pelo manifest quando o run termina em done. Convive com trg_forge_run_last_run. Migration atômica via psql.
acceptanceCriteria: supabase/migrations/20260604a_prd_delivery_on_run_done.sql existe com a DDL do §7
Função update_prd_delivery_on_done registrada em pg_proc
Trigger trg_forge_run_delivery_review registrado em ForgeRun (AFTER UPDATE OF status)
Atualizar ForgeRun pra status=done flipa deliveryStatus de PRDs in_progress cobertos pelo manifest pra review
Não pisa em deliveryStatus já em done/changes_requested/in_production

verifiable.command_or_query: source <(grep '^DIRECT_URL=' .env | sed 's/^/export /') && psql "$DIRECT_URL" -f supabase/migrations/20260604a_prd_delivery_on_run_done.sql
SELECT tgname FROM pg_trigger WHERE tgrelid='"ForgeRun"'::regclass AND tgname='trg_forge_run_delivery_review';
SELECT proname FROM pg_proc WHERE proname='update_prd_delivery_on_done';

userStories.title: SQL smoke — run done flipa deliveryStatus pra review
userStories.description: Check transacional (ROLLBACK) que cria um ForgeRun cobrindo 1 PRD em deliveryStatus in_progress, atualiza o run pra done, e verifica que o PRD virou review. Não persiste. Roda após PV2F-001 aplicado.
acceptanceCriteria: Query transacional sobe ForgeRun done e lê deliveryStatus=review do PRD coberto
PRD com deliveryStatus=done NÃO é alterado pelo mesmo run
Transação faz ROLLBACK (sem efeito colateral)

userStories.title: DAL — createForgeRunFromProject
userStories.description: Adiciona createForgeRunFromProject({projectId, ownerId, prdRefs}) em forge-project.ts. Usa getPrdsForProject(projectId,{status:['approved','ready']}), filtra por prdRefs (não-vazio), aplica o gate story_without_verifiable, snapshotManifest("", eligible), insere ForgeRun(status=queued, designSessionId=null, trigger=ad_hoc, manifest, repoUrl) e cria ForgeJob queued. Retorna {runId, jobId, prdCount}.
acceptanceCriteria: forge-project.ts exporta createForgeRunFromProject
Não referencia project.forgeSourceSessionId no novo caminho
Usa getPrdsForProject + snapshotManifest existentes
Lança erro claro se prdRefs vazio ou nenhum PRD aprovado casa
Aplica o gate story_without_verifiable idêntico ao path session

verifiable.command_or_query: npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | grep -E 'forge-project' || echo no-errors
grep -cE 'export async function createForgeRunFromProject' src/lib/dal/forge-project.ts
grep -c 'getPrdsForProject' src/lib/dal/forge-project.ts

userStories.title: API — POST runs aceita prdRefs (project-run)
userStories.description: Estende src/app/api/forge/projects/[id]/runs/route.ts: se body.prdRefs é array não-vazio, chama createForgeRunFromProject e retorna 202 { runId, jobId, prdCount } — sem olhar forgeSourceSessionId (D7). Caso contrário mantém o path createForgeRunFromSession (retryFailed/prdRefsFilter). Guard manager inalterado.
acceptanceCriteria: route.ts importa e chama createForgeRunFromProject quando body.prdRefs é não-vazio
Branch project-run NÃO depende de forgeSourceSessionId
Retorna 202 com { runId } quando prdRefs passado
Mantém back-compat com retryFailed e session-run
Guard hasMinAccessLevel(manager) preservado

verifiable.command_or_query: npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | grep -E 'forge/projects/\[id\]/runs' || echo no-errors
grep -c 'createForgeRunFromProject' 'src/app/api/forge/projects/[id]/runs/route.ts'

curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/forge/projects/<pid>/runs -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"prdRefs":["<REF>"]}' (autenticado como manager, projeto sem session, >=1 PRD aprovado)

userStories.title: API — POST production toggle
userStories.description: Cria src/app/api/forge/projects/[id]/prds/[prdId]/production/route.ts. POST {deployed:boolean} seta ProductRequirement.deployedToProductionAt = (deployed ? now() : null) WHERE id=prdId AND projectId=id. Guard manager. 404 se PRD não pertence ao projeto. Retorna 200 {id, deployedToProductionAt}.
acceptanceCriteria: route.ts existe com handler POST
UPDATE filtra por id AND projectId (404 se não casar)
deployed=true seta now(); deployed=false seta null
Guard hasMinAccessLevel(manager)

verifiable.command_or_query: npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | grep -E 'prds/\[prdId\]/production' || echo no-errors
grep -cE 'export (async )?function POST' 'src/app/api/forge/projects/[id]/prds/[prdId]/production/route.ts'
grep -c 'deployedToProductionAt' 'src/app/api/forge/projects/[id]/prds/[prdId]/production/route.ts'

userStories.title: API — prds payload expõe deliveryStatus + deployedToProductionAt
userStories.description: Estende src/app/api/forge/projects/[id]/prds/route.ts: cada PrdLine inclui deliveryStatus e deployedToProductionAt lidos do ProductRequirement row, pro kanban classificar Review/Production.
acceptanceCriteria: Tipo PrdLine ganha deliveryStatus: string e deployedToProductionAt: string|null
Cada item do payload popula esses campos do row
tsc passa

verifiable.command_or_query: npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | grep -E 'forge/projects/\[id\]/prds' || echo no-errors
grep -cE 'deliveryStatus|deployedToProductionAt' 'src/app/api/forge/projects/[id]/prds/route.ts'

userStories.title: classify-prd.ts (lib) + página nova projects-v2/[id]/forge/kanban
userStories.description: Extrai a lógica de coluna pra src/lib/forge/classify-prd.ts (ColumnKey com 'review'/'production', COLUMNS, PrdItem com deliveryStatus+deployedToProductionAt, classifyPrd com a precedência do §9). Cria a página nova admin-gated src/app/(dashboard)/projects-v2/[id]/forge/kanban/page.tsx que importa COLUMNS+classifyPrd e renderiza as lanes. NÃO toca o kanban legado.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/forge/classify-prd.ts exporta COLUMNS, classifyPrd, ColumnKey, PrdItem
ColumnKey inclui 'review' e 'production'; classifyPrd retorna 'production' quando deployedToProductionAt não-null (precede tudo) e 'review' quando deliveryStatus==='review'
src/app/(dashboard)/projects-v2/[id]/forge/kanban/page.tsx existe, admin-gated (redirect /projects se não-admin), importando de classify-prd.ts
O arquivo legado projects/[id]/forge/kanban/page.tsx NÃO é modificado

verifiable.command_or_query: npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | grep -E 'classify-prd|projects-v2/\[id\]/forge/kanban' || echo no-errors
grep -cE "'review'|'production'" src/lib/forge/classify-prd.ts
grep -c 'classify-prd' 'src/app/(dashboard)/projects-v2/[id]/forge/kanban/page.tsx'

userStories.title: Kanban v2 — botão "marcar prod" no card de Review
userStories.description: No card do kanban v2, quando columnKey==='review', renderiza botão 'marcar prod ★' que faz POST /api/forge/projects/[id]/prds/[prdId]/production { deployed:true } e refaz o load. Card de Production mostra ★ + data.
acceptanceCriteria: Card em Review tem botão que chama o endpoint production com deployed:true
Card em Production renderiza indicador com a data
tsc + lint passam

verifiable.command_or_query: npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | grep -E 'projects-v2/\[id\]/forge/kanban' || echo no-errors
grep -c 'production' 'src/app/(dashboard)/projects-v2/[id]/forge/kanban/page.tsx'

userStories.title: Wire Enviar pra Forge no board → POST runs
userStories.description: Liga o botão host stub Enviar pra Forge (do projects-v2-area) ao endpoint: coleta prdRefs (references) dos PRDs selecionados / da sprint e faz POST /api/forge/projects/[id]/runs {prdRefs}. Sucesso -> toast com runId + refetch. Erro -> showErrorToast.
acceptanceCriteria: Handler do botão monta prdRefs e faz POST .../runs
Sucesso mostra feedback (toast) com runId; erro via showErrorToast
Multi-select envia N refs num único run (batch)

verifiable.command_or_query: npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | grep -E 'projects-v2' || echo no-errors

Como admin, em projects-v2 board de um projeto sem session carregada e com >=2 PRDs aprovados: selecionar 2 PRDs, clicar Enviar pra Forge. Validar: toast com runId, run aparece queued, PRDs entram em in_progress.
verifiable.expected: Run criado (202) + PRDs selecionados no run

userStories.title: Smoke browser — kanban Review/Production visíveis e funcionais
userStories.description: Validação visual ponta-a-ponta: colunas Review e Production renderizam, um run terminado move o PRD pra Review, e o toggle manual move pra Production.
acceptanceCriteria: Colunas Review e Production aparecem no kanban
PRD com deliveryStatus=review cai na coluna Review
Clicar marcar prod move o PRD pra Production e persiste após reload

verifiable.command_or_query: Abrir /projects-v2/<id>/forge/kanban como admin. Confirmar colunas Review + Production. Num PRD de Review, clicar marcar prod ★ e recarregar.
verifiable.expected: PRD aparece em Production com ★ + data após reload

verifiable.command_or_query: grep -cE 'Review|Production' src/lib/forge/classify-prd.ts
